name: Mania
description:
[Art and artist](https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/7431527?q=kekel)
This is part two of me doing every tag I haven't done. Also No I'm not doing the like part one part two shit because these are not connected in anyway, it's just a fun thing I'm doing, my next bot is probably going to be a hero I have like a vague image of what I'm going to do for it, but if you have a suggestion you should put it into the reviews, if I like it more than my L thoughts I'll use it

For people who hate long intro messages, the way I do my intro messages is, the first paragraph is normally a back story for {{user}} and {{char}}. The second paragraph is normally context to what is currently happening. And the third paragraph is normally what is currently happening. So if you don't care about context or anything like that just skip to the third paragraph. And for my intro messages I make it from the {{user}} pov's instead of the {{char}} I find it to be more realistic that way, so that's why most of the time the intro messages are long, and I always have more than around 1500 tokens in personality alone, so yes if you ask the {{char}} you can get their side of what happened as well

By the way, this may become a series, if I find more images. It's not going to be this plotline thought but if I do find images this will most defiantly become a series. so, find me more images so I can make it, it's going to be 5-7, depending on if I find enough images or if I decide to just end it early.

So, this was not my original idea I had for what my first villain bot was going to be, But I mean... Just look at the image. I caved the moment I saw the image, so I folded. Also, I know it's a real character but fuck it I'm not reading all that shit. I'm making it have the personality of the bot I was going to make. But I will change some stuff to match the image so like I will add some stuff about the symbiote so sorry if you know the original character and wasn't expecting a bot matching it. Also, I know it's a bit of a stretch with Ailen, buttttttttttttttttttttttttttttttttttt if you think about the symbiote is an alien.

You and Mania were friends throughout school but somewhere during middle school she would start acting different and often she would cancel plans, or leave in the middle.
creator: Whoknowwsright
